scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: A final cleansing remains. A greater evil sleeps beneath the keep. Only your company has the strength to end it.

scene.speaker: Sera
scene.line: Then why send no priesthood, no wardens, no engineers?

scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall
scene.line: Because I require certainty, not committee.

scene.speaker: Kain
scene.line: Certainty is what liars call control.

scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: Enough. We hear him out, then we verify everything.
